case_title: JOHN FITCH VS. THE SALVATION ARMY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FITCH, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT THE SALVATION ARMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
